creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 219808
v1

Moin moin 


kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade devel/cmake to 3.18.5 (3.19.0 is also already out, but has fallout in llvm10, so we should keep 3.18.x for now).

The patch is attached, but can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/cmake-3.18.5.v1.diff


mfg Tobias
